_source: IHKE3408S02 (影像檢查 detail) — single ECG row captured live from NHI
_note: Real-world OPD ECG: ordered 113/01/31 in clinic, performed + signed off 113/02/29, uploaded 113/03/12. real_INSPECT_DATE is null, so the only way to recover the actual exam date is main_tit (= 簽收日 = exam day per NHI semantics). Using func_DATE would shift the exam back to the order day. PII (patient name, national ID, doctor names) scrubbed; date fields preserved exactly.
